title: Restrict admin dashboard access to specific authorized identity

requirements.text: In the backend, store a hardcoded list of authorized Internet Identity principals that correspond to the owner's accounts (linked to lakshaypgoyal@gmail.com and phone 9978625857). Expose a query function `isAuthorized(caller: Principal): Bool` that returns true only if the calling principal is in the authorized list. The `getInquiries` function must check authorization and trap (or return an error) if the caller is not authorized.

quotes: The inquiries should only when log in with lakshaypgoyal@gmail.com or my number 9978625857

acceptanceCriteria: The backend `getInquiries` function rejects calls from non-authorized principals.
Only the principal(s) linked to lakshaypgoyal@gmail.com or phone 9978625857 via Internet Identity can successfully retrieve inquiries.
Unauthorized callers receive a clear error/trap response.

requirements.text: On the Admin Dashboard page (`AdminDashboardPage.tsx`), after the user authenticates via Internet Identity, call the backend `isAuthorized` check (or handle the error response from `getInquiries`). If the authenticated user's principal is not authorized, display an 'Access Denied' message explaining that this dashboard is restricted to the site owner, and do not render the inquiry table. Only the specific authorized principal(s) associated with lakshaypgoyal@gmail.com or phone number 9978625857 should see the inquiry data.

quotes: The inquiries should only when log in with lakshaypgoyal@gmail.com or my number 9978625857

acceptanceCriteria: An authenticated user who is NOT the authorized owner sees an 'Access Denied' message instead of the inquiry table.
The authorized owner (principal linked to lakshaypgoyal@gmail.com or 9978625857) can log in and view the full inquiry table.
Unauthenticated users still see the login prompt (existing behavior preserved).
No inquiry data is leaked to unauthorized authenticated users.

requirements.text: Add a one-time setup mechanism or clear inline documentation in the backend so the site owner can register their Internet Identity principal as the authorized admin. Provide an `initAdmin` or `setAuthorizedPrincipal` function callable only once (or only by the canister controller) to store the owner's principal after their first Internet Identity login. Alternatively, if the principal is already known, hardcode it directly.

quotes: The inquiries should only when log in with lakshaypgoyal@gmail.com or my number 9978625857

acceptanceCriteria: There is a clear, functional mechanism for the authorized principal to be set or verified in the backend.
Only the designated owner principal can access inquiries after the mechanism is in place.
The mechanism prevents arbitrary users from granting themselves admin access.

constraints: Do not edit any files under frontend/src/hooks/ (immutable paths).
All Motoko logic must remain in backend/main.mo (single-actor architecture).
Internet Identity is the only supported authentication mechanism — do not integrate external OAuth or Gmail APIs.
nonGoals: Changing the visual design or brand theme.
Adding multi-admin or role-based access control beyond a single owner.
Sending email or SMS notifications to the owner.
Integrating directly with Gmail or phone number verification services.
